lastReleaseMessage: README + recruitment posts to native-3D identity, voice guard widened

items: Most art assets still outstanding after the native-3D rework
Mission content beyond the first playable

barRaise.topFinding: Two shipped runtime bugs put the verdict at needs-attention, and both are the same shape: a system that reports fine while doing nothing. No node in the native-3D path ever joins the buildings group, so economy.get_colony_size() returns 0 forever and the per-colonist Provisions drain, a core survival mechanic, has never once fired (source/autoloads/economy.gd:705-717). Separately, _save_run omits every run-defining parameter (map size, difficulty, enemy and wave scalars, mode, god_mode), so a cross-session Continue rebuilds the world from run_config defaults and overlays the saved base onto a mismatched map (source/world3d/world_3d.gd:651-679). Health fell 7 points because this was the first full fan-out since 2026-07-05 and the lenses reached deeper: the README still describes the retired 2D isometric game, the recruitment post recruits 2D sprite artists for the retired lore, and 533 raw sprite files from commercial asset packs sit in a public repo with no license record. None of this is new decay; it is newly seen.

actions.title: Add placed 3D buildings to the buildings group with a resolvable building_name, or derive colony size from _building_meta housing yields, so the Provisions drain fires.
Serialize the active run_config parameters into the save and restore them before _apply_run_config runs on a continue load.
Rewrite the README Status, Tech stack, and pitch to the native-3D M4 identity.
Rewrite docs/inat-recruitment-post.md to recruit 3D model and animation work under the exoplanet portal lore, or retire the draft.
Land the queued hbh-gdd-path-extends-convention-stale-2026-07-10 item so the GDD Architecture tab stops teaching the reverse of the shipped convention.
Replace tick_terror's every-frame O(N) get_positions() scan with get_enemies_near and a squared-distance test.
Record the license terms for each vendored asset pack, then either confirm redistribution or git rm the 533 raw pack copies and add a LICENSE and CREDITS file.
Re-aim the next few versions at the mission data layer and one end-to-end 3D mission instead of art-gated polish.
Replace every em dash in README.md and both docs/inat-recruitment-post*.md with a hyphen, comma, or colon.
Change both addedAt comparisons in queue-drain-4h/SKILL.md Step 1 to added so staleness triage fires.
Flip GDD backlog rows S-13, S-17, S-15, U-05 and U-06 off flat done so the completion tally matches what runs in the 3D build.
Cap concurrent alive enemies so campaign mode's endless waves cannot grow the field without bound.
Set data-asset-default on every tracker row whose model is wired and on disk, keeping localStorage as the override layer.
Replace the five BAD SURPRISE placeholder mission names on the mode-select cards with the GDD section 11 names.
Track the un-ported 3D gameplay regressions as an explicit backlog block, starting with the horde_day_announced signal auto_pause.gd:88 waits on and nothing emits.
Trim hbh-gdd-saveload-structural-refs-2026-07-05 evidence to the single open sub-item at GDD line 2086.
Reclassify hbh-multimesh-crowd-migration-2026-06-28 to blocked-on-user, per its own verify note.
Extend the silent-guard runbook entry and audit-silent-guards.ps1 to flag get_nodes_in_group("X") with no matching add_to_group("X").
git rm docs/GDD.html.bak.voice and add a *.bak.voice gitignore rule.
Give the audit-to-queue handoff a path that rewrites a matched item's evidence when a re-audit resolves part of it.
Wrap the gate-page WriteAllText in the same 5-attempt write-verify-retry loop used for project.godot and the GDD.
Wire world_3d through the research autoload, or retire the autoload and record the local table as canonical.
Draw minimap enemy dots from a reused buffer with a batched primitive instead of a Dictionary and draw_circle per enemy at 20Hz.
Decouple the doctrine draft from the clear-to-zero condition and steepen enemy scaling to match the player power curve.
Fix the asset-tracker filter so child rows inside collapsed groups reveal on a match, and count only visible rows.
Add a nav-on profiling pass at 1k, 2k and 3k so the ceiling numbers reflect the shipped per-Node path.
Add an em-dash rule plus we've, I've and Here's to check_gdd_voice.py and extend its scanned file set.
Delete the blind lock-clear blocks in push-to-github.ps1:23-40 and publish-gdd.ps1:512-518 and rely on Assert-GitSafe.
Pin audit-hordes-nightly Step 1 to personal-skills:project-canonical-audit so the duplicate name cannot misroute.
Rewrite docs/GDD.html:2086 so it stops calling the removed save_load autoload live.
Add an em-dash rule to the voice guard and scan the README and recruitment posts.
Invoke audit-silent-guards.ps1 from push-to-github.ps1, report-only and non-fatal.
Add a missed-window catch-up to bar-raise-hordes keyed on barRaise.latestReportAt.
Provision .discord_audit_webhook.txt in secrets, or remove the Step 3.5 invocation and its template.
Fix the YaE detail page milestone prose to M4 and key its version marker with :Hordes.
Reconstruct saved records into staging before _clear_run() and read fields with .get() defaults.
Read _load_run building and unit record fields with .get() defaults and type-guard each element.
Scale wave cadence to run difficulty and map size instead of a fixed 22s metronome.

deferred.title: Pick the animated-vs-instanced crowd render path: the v0.99.30 re-baseline shows animated Zombie1 at 26 fps at 1k enemies, so the per-Node animated path cannot reach the S-34 hundreds-to-thousands target.
deferred.reason: owner look-decision; the use_crowd3d A/B seam is wired (v0.99.31) so the call is measurable. Queue item hbh-multimesh-crowd-migration-2026-06-28 should be reclassified blocked-on-user.

deferred.title: Renumber off the v0.99.x band, which reads as 1.0-imminent while the game sits at milestone 4 of 8 with all content, art, audio and launch work untouched.
deferred.reason: blocked on a Nick decision about the versioning scheme

deferred.title: Re-export the commissioned building and unit models to a coherent shared scale so the hardcoded per-model scale constants can all become 1.0.
deferred.reason: art-delivery-gated, same gate as hbh-asset-production-pass (blocked-on-user since 2026-06-10)

deferred.title: Replace the ~14 placeholder colored-box buildings with finished models.
Add a save/load block for the research autoload's tech-tree state and bump SAVE_VERSION for the schema change.
deferred.reason: the research autoload has no 3D consumer yet; premature until the tech tree is wired into the 3D run

deferred.title: Add a SAVE_VERSION migration dispatch and an older-format fixture test.
deferred.reason: no incompatible SAVE_VERSION bump yet; migration premature pre-M4-lock, and the live save is atomic as of v0.99.28

deferred.title: Purge the ~440 MB of superseded binary revisions from git history and move the ~109 MB of temp/test 3D assets into the gitignored _ARCHIVE path.
deferred.reason: history rewrite is a Nick decision; the asset move must migrate the lookdev scenes with it

deferred.title: Sweep the residual Midjourney/Tripo tool names from the GDD changelog body.
deferred.reason: judged factual asset-pipeline documentation a solo dev would legitimately keep

deferred.title: Remove the disabled bar-raise-hbh scheduled-task husk.
deferred.reason: removal requires the app closed; X:\Claude\restart-cleanup.ps1 covers it
